$bookingId..read: auth != null && auth.token.role === 'patient' && auth.token.bookingId === $bookingId && auth.token.rtdbPath === 'consultations/' + $bookingId && auth.token.tenantId === data.child('patientTenantId').val() && auth.token.accountId === data.child('patientAccountId').val() && auth.token.profileId === data.child('patientProfileId').val()
